headline: How Fed Consent Order Exit And Capital Moves At Wells Fargo (WFC) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: In late February 2026, Wells Fargo announced a series of new fixed-rate note offerings across maturities out to 2046, filed a US$3.41 billion employee stock ownership plan-related common stock shelf registration, and moved to redeem all remaining Series BB preferred shares on March 16, 2026. These capital moves arrive just as the Federal Reserve has terminated its 2018 consent order against Wells Fargo, leaving the bank without outstanding Fed enforcement actions for the first time in 15...
